claims.text: Teams should build their own software factory rather than one-off agent loops

anchors.label: Eric Zakariasson, Cursor
anchors.quote: getting to a place where you can build your own like software factory

claims.text: Agent workflows need staged plan, produce, and review cycles

anchors.label: Eric Zakariasson, Cursor
anchors.quote: you should have multiple different stages where you you plan it, you produce it, you review it and you essentially follow the whole uh SLC

claims.text: Context should be frontloaded via plans or long specs before agents execute

anchors.label: Eric Zakariasson, Cursor
anchors.quote: you kind of like frontload uh the context to the agents either through like a plan or a long spec and then you send them off

claims.text: Maintaining a software factory requires overview of agent processes

anchors.label: Eric Zakariasson, Cursor
anchors.quote: maintaining a factory would require you to have an overview of the processes you want your coding agents to go through.

claims.text: The harness is evolving from a local loop into a staged software factory
claims.caveats: Book synthesis claim — anchored to this talk as primary evidence.

anchors.label: Eric Zakariasson, Cursor
anchors.quote: getting to a place where you can build your own like software factory
